headline: Bitcoin Mining Mergers Needed Amid AI Power Shortage

article.title: Bernstein says Bitcoin mining deals necessary for AI power crunch
article.summary: Bernstein analysts remain bullish on the Bitcoin mining sector, as deals with third-party providers will be necessary to address the computing power limits of AI data centers.

headline: HYPE Plunges as $150M Locked Tokens Await Withdrawal

article.title: HYPE falls as crypto funds queue nearly $150M in locked tokens for withdrawal
article.summary: HYPE briefly fell 8% from its local highs as Multicoin Capital, Selini Capital and Galaxy Digital queued nearly $150 million of the token for withdrawals.

headline: US Futures Slide 1.2% on AI Concerns

article.title: US Stock Futures Drop as Traders Focus on AI Spending, Oil Jumps
article.summary: US stock futures retreated as worries over artificial-intelligence spending weighed on sentiment while oil prices closed in on $100 a barrel. Traders braced for more key earnings from Intel Corp., due later in the afternoon.

headline: Cellnex Weighs Options Amid 20% Share Price Plunge

article.title: Cellnex Studies Strategic Options After Share Price Slump
article.summary: Cellnex Telecom SA is evaluating strategic options, according to people familiar with the matter, as the wireless tower operator looks at ways to grapple with its debt load and weak share price.

headline: Crypto Hacks Surge 12x, $124M Lost in 6 Months
